markdownRemark.html:
NOTE: This extension is still in development, more info & images coming soon

Do you want to customize your Chrome Scrollbars? Try Fancy Scrollbar!

It's very easy, fast and you can change almost everything!

Current Settings:

  • ◉ Thumb and Track thickness
  • ◉ Corner Radius
  • ◉ Thumb and Track colors
  • ◉ Thumb hover color

Download
